name: Using Product Types
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can organize your product catalog and enhance reporting capabilities through Product Types in "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": ", which enable systematic product categorization supporting detailed sales analysis and inventory management. This classification system helps retail operators segment product performance and maintain organized catalogs, with effective Product Type use typically improving reporting insights and supporting strategic merchandising decisions across Australian retail operations."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Product Type configuration in "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": " enables retail operators to establish meaningful product categories that support business intelligence, inventory segmentation, and operational reporting. This categorization capability helps ensure your retail operations can analyze performance by product category, manage inventory by type, and make informed merchandising decisions based on category-level insights."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A Product Type is a mandatory product field used to categorise products into groups, offering the following benefits:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Easier to search for groups of products"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create Stocktakes for specific Product Types only"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Filtering Reports e.g. Sales Report"}]}]}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppjVtEAI.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "data-id": "product-type-sales-indicators"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Sales Indicators help you to identify the sales performance of various products, making it easier to determine which products to re-order when using the Stock Replenishment feature."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Indicators are calculated by looking at transactions over the past 90 days."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppjW3EAI.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "children": [{"text": "The indicators automatically calculated by Retail Express are as follows:"}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Sales Indicator", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Details", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "New"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If the product is less than 30 days old and the number of units sold is zero"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Slow"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Slow-moving products - automatically set to 90 days"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Dead"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Products created more than 30 days ago and have not sold in the past 90 days"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Undefined"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Products without any Sales Indicators set"}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-32cd593c"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Customised Sales Indicators"}], "data-id": "customised-sales-indicators"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can manually enter a value for the Rocket, Fast and Average indicators based on how many units are sold over a 90 day period."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppjTGEAY.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppjTGEAY.jpg", above, we can review two products to determine which indicator would apply:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Product 1: sold 180 units in the past 90 days"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The sales rate for this product is 0.5, aka 1 unit every half-day (90 divided by 180)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "This product would be a "Rocket" product"}]}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Product 2:  sold 45 products in 90 days"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The sales rate would be 2 (1 product every 2 days, or 90 divided by 45)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "This product would be a "Fast" product"}]}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Using the example above, any product that has been sold in the past 90 days but with a sales rate greater than 5 would be considered a "slow" product."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Using the "}, {"text": "Stock Replenishment"}, {"text": " Filters you can set up a frequent reordering process to ensure you always have enough stock on hand of your rocket/fast-moving stock."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": This means that only a single Product Type can be assigned per product."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you would like to use a Department, Category and Sub Category structure you can still achieve this by putting all of the information together into one line.
